html:
Grey may refer to:

  • Characters:
    • Argoth Stone-Skin, a character in the legend of Maris the Maid known as the Grey Giant.
    • Damon Lanniter, a Lord of Casterly Rock known as the Grey Lion.
    • Gareth the Grey, a knight during the First Blackfyre Rebellion.
    • Garibald Grey, a knight during the Dance of the Dragons.
    • Garris the Grey, a legendary Rhoynish prince.
    • Garth X Gardener, a king known as Garth Greybeard.
    • Garth Greyfeather, a ranger of the Night's Watch.
    • Garth Hightower, a knight known as Greysteel.
    • Gordan I Gardener, a king known as Grey-Eyes.
    • Greydon, a Grand Maester.
    • Greydon Gardener, a king.
    • Greydon Goodbrother, the heir of Hammerhorn.
    • Grey King, a legendary monarch of the Iron Islands.
    • Grey Worm, the commander of the Unsullied.
    • Gyles Greycloak, a knight of the Kingsguard.
    • Hugh Grandison, the Lord of Grandview known as Greybeard.
    • Old Grey Gull, a priest of the Drowned God.
    • The Shrouded Lord, a mysterious figure of the Rhoyne known as His Grey Grace.
  • Noble Houses:
    • House Grey
    • House Greyiron
    • House Greyjoy
    • House Greystark
  • Geography:
    • Gallowsgrey, the seat of House Trant.
    • Ghaston Grey, a prison in the Sea of Dorne.
    • Grey Cliffs, a series of cliffs in the North.
    • Grey Gallows, an island in the Stepstones.
    • Grey Garden, the seat of a cadet branch of House Harlaw.
    • Grey Glen, the seat of House Tollett.
    • Grey King's Hall, a ruin in the Iron Islands.
    • Grey Waste, a vast desert.
  • Others:
    • Grey Ghost, a dragon.
    • Grey Ghost, a ship.
    • Grey Jeyne, a dog.
    • Grey plague, also known as the grey death, a disease.
    • Grey Wind, a direwolf.
    • Greyscale, a disease.
